summary: First full test pass on Modular Pages hero-carousel WYSIWYG editor. All 4 backend endpoints pass (root, upload png, public file proxy, reject .txt). All frontend flows pass: iframe preview with 3 default slides, live title update, theme color change, height/overlay/interval sliders, autoplay/arrows/dots toggles, add/remove slide, clipboard copy, snippet drawer, and multi-instance independence (two pasted snippets both initialize with data-ns-init=1 and operate independently).
critical_code_review_comments: Preview iframe uses sandbox='allow-scripts allow-same-origin' which triggers a browser warning (iframe can escape its sandbox). Not a security issue in this client-side-only app because srcDoc is generated from internal state, but consider dropping allow-same-origin if it isn't needed for your setup.

config.uid in makeDefaultConfig is generated once per editor session, so copying the snippet twice and pasting both produces two <section> elements sharing the SAME .ns-hero-{uid} class. The IIFE correctly uses per-root state so behavior is independent (verified), but scoped CSS selectors like .ns-hero-{uid} are still shared — acceptable since the style is identical, but if a user pastes two different snippets generated at different times without changing anything in theme, both still share the same uid. Consider regenerating uid at render time of the copied snippet or at Copy click to guarantee DOM/CSS isolation across copies.

Backend EMERGENT_LLM_KEY is read at import but init_storage errors are logged silently at startup — a bad key would only surface on first /api/upload. Consider surfacing storage config at /api/health.
storage_key is a process-global; if it expires there is no refresh on 401. Could lead to production upload outages until a server restart.
Upload endpoint accepts content-type from client but does not validate that bytes actually match the extension; minor but worth noting for a public proxy.
seed_data_creation: Uploaded one 1x1 TEST_hero.png via /api/upload during backend test run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers health, upload happy path, public file proxy and rejection of bad extensions. For Playwright, Radix sliders require clicking the [role=slider] thumb then keyboard arrow presses — calling slider.focus() on the wrapper does not work. Preview iframe accessed via page.frame_locator('[data-testid="preview-iframe"]'). Multi-instance test technique: copy clipboard after clicking data-testid=copy-snippet-button, then page.goto('about:blank') and page.set_content with two divs each containing the clipboard string; verify section[data-ns-init='1'] count is 2 and dot clicks scoped to each section operate independently.
